OTP_MESSAGE: Your verification code is {code}. It expires in {minutes} minutes. Do not share this code with anyone.
OTP_ALREADY_USED: This verification code has already been used.
WHATSAPP_QUEUE_FAILED: UltraMsg API accepted request but failed to queue message upstream.
WHATSAPP_DELIVERY_FAILED: Failed to deliver verification message via WhatsApp gateway.
WHATSAPP_SENDING_FAILED: Failed to send verification message via WhatsApp, but OTP is kept in DB for testing.
REGISTRATION_TIMEOUT: Registration timeout. Please re-enter your details and request a new verification code.
INVALID_PHONE_NUMBER: The entered phone number is incorrect or has an invalid format.
ACCOUNT_NOT_APPROVED_YET: The account has not been approved yet. Please wait until it is approved by the administration.
BENEFICIARY_FILES_REQUIRED: Personal photo and family statement files are required.
INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS: You do not have sufficient permission to perform this action.
STAFF_ONLY_CONTROL_PANEL: Only employees and admins can access the control panel.
